options.saveValidator: function(formData) { if(formData.name === 'proxy' || formData.name === 'logging' || formData.name === 'true' || formData.name === 'false' || formData.name === 'additional_parameters' || formData.name === 'additional_settings') { return 'Can not create account named anyone of [proxy, logging, true, false, additional_parameters, additional_settings]. These are reserved keywords in Splunk.' ; } return true; }

entity.label: Name
entity.help: Enter a unique name for the data input

validators.errorMsg: Input Name must start with a letter and followed by alphabetic letters, digits or underscores.
Length of input name should be between 1 and 100

entity.label: ND account
entity.help: Nexus Dashboard Account to use for this input.

entity.label: Interval
entity.help: Data collection interval in seconds.

validators.errorMsg: Interval must be a positive integer.
Length of index name should be between 1 and 80.

entity.label: Input Type
entity.help: Select the type of input.

entity.label: Fabric Name
entity.help: Name of the Fabric - limit the records pertaining to the fabric.

entity.label: Node Name
entity.help: Node Name - limit the records pertaining to given node name. Supports multiple values separated by commas. Example: LEAF_2201, LEAF_2202

entity.label: Interface Name
entity.help: Interface Name - limit the records pertaining to the given interface name. Supports multiple values separated by commas. Example: eth1/1, eth1/2

entity.label: Scope
entity.help: Choose a Scope from the list.

entity.label: Category
entity.help: Select the Category to filter anomalies data.

entity.label: Category
entity.help: Select the Category to filter advisories data.

entity.label: Severity
entity.help: Select the Severity to filter data.

entity.label: Additional Query Parameters
entity.help: Lucene format Filter - filter the response based on this filter field. Example: nodeName:scalespine-602 OR nodeName:scalespine-601.

entity.label: Time Slice
entity.help: The time interval (in seconds) for collecting flow data. If no interval is specified, data for all events within a 5-second interval will be collected, starting from the specified Time Range up to the current time.

validators.errorMsg: Time Slice must be a positive integer.

entity.label: Time Range
entity.help: Specify the Time Range for data collection starting from N seconds, minutes, hours or days ago until now. The value must be a positive number followed by 's' for seconds, 'm' for minutes, 'h' for hours, or 'd' for days. Example: 5h, 30m, or 1d.

validators.errorMsg: Time Range must be a positive number followed by 's/S', 'm/M', 'h/H', or 'd/D'.

entity.label: Time Range
entity.help: The Time Range for last N hours and must be greater than or equal to 0. If 0 is specified, all events (from the start of time) would be collected.

validators.errorMsg: Time Range must be a positive integer.

entity.label: Time Range
entity.help: Specify the Time Range for data collection starting from N seconds, minutes, hours or days ago until now. The value must be a positive number followed by 's' for seconds, 'm' for minutes, 'h' for hours, or 'd' for days. Example: 5h, 30m, or 1d.

validators.errorMsg: Time Range must be a positive number followed by 's/S', 'm/M', 'h/H', or 'd/D'.

entity.label: Granularity
entity.help: Specify the Granularity for data collection starting from N seconds, minutes, or hours ago. The value must be a positive number followed by 'h' for hours, 'm' for minutes, or 's' for seconds. Example: 5h, 30m, or 30s. If nothing is specified, 5 minutes will be default granularity.

validators.errorMsg: Granularity must be a positive number followed by 's/S', 'm/M', 'h/H', or 'd/D'.

entity.label: Class Name(s)
entity.help: Enter space separated Class Name(s).

validators.errorMsg: Enter valid Class Name(s). Class Name(s) can only include letters, numbers, spaces, hyphens, and underscores.

entity.label: Custom Endpoint
entity.help: Enter the custom endpoint. Example: sedgeapi/v1/cisco-nir/api/api/v1/anomalies/details

entity.label: Additional Query Parameters
entity.help: Enter the additional query parameters for this custom endpoint. Example: siteGroupName=default&siteName=DC-WEST

entity.label: Sourcetype
entity.help: Enter the sourcetype for the data to be collected.

validators.errorMsg: Sourcetype must start with a letter and can only include letters, numbers, underscores (_), periods (.), colons (:), and hyphens (-).

entity.label: Ingestion Key
entity.help: Enter the key from the JSON response that should be used for data ingestion into Splunk. This key will identify the specific data field to be extracted and indexed by Splunk. If not provided, the 'entries' key will be used by default.

validators.errorMsg: Space is not allowed for Ingestion Key.

entity.help: Enter a unique name for the data input

entity.help: Enter the additional parameters for this input. Example: rsp-subtree-include=faults&query-target=subtree
